cards.prompt: Probe.Equals считает вызовы. Ищем ОТСУТСТВУЮЩИЙ среди 1000: list.Contains vs set.Contains. Печать $"{listCmp} {setCmp}"?
cards.code: using System.Collections.Generic; class Probe { public static int EqCalls; public readonly int V; public Probe(int v){V=v;} public override bool Equals(object o){EqCalls++; return o is Probe p && p.V==V;} public override int GetHashCode()=>V.GetHashCode(); } const int N=1000; var list=new List<Probe>(); var set=new HashSet<Probe>(); for(int i=0;i<N;i++){var p=new Probe(i); list.Add(p); set.Add(p);} var target=new Probe(N+7); Probe.EqCalls=0; _=list.Contains(target); int listCmp=Probe.EqCalls; Probe.EqCalls=0; _=set.Contains(target); int setCmp=Probe.EqCalls; System.Console.WriteLine($"{listCmp} {setCmp}");

cards.prompt: Probe-счётчик, ищем элемент по индексу 500 (он есть): list.Contains(mid) vs set.Contains(mid). Печать $"{listMid} {setMid}"?
cards.code: using System.Collections.Generic; class Probe { public static int EqCalls; public readonly int V; public Probe(int v){V=v;} public override bool Equals(object o){EqCalls++; return o is Probe p && p.V==V;} public override int GetHashCode()=>V.GetHashCode(); } const int N=1000; var list=new List<Probe>(); var set=new HashSet<Probe>(); Probe mid=null; for(int i=0;i<N;i++){var p=new Probe(i); list.Add(p); set.Add(p); if(i==500) mid=p;} Probe.EqCalls=0; _=list.Contains(mid); int listMid=Probe.EqCalls; Probe.EqCalls=0; _=set.Contains(mid); int setMid=Probe.EqCalls; System.Console.WriteLine($"{listMid} {setMid}");
using System.Collections.Generic; var list = new List<int> { 5, 3, 9, 1 }; System.Console.WriteLine(list[2]); System.Console.WriteLine(list.IndexOf(9));
